records.ety: [L. exacerbatus, p. p. of exacerbare; ex out (intens.) + acerbare. See Acerbate.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Exacerbated (gz*s"r*bā`td); p. pr. & vb. n. Exacerbating (gz*s"r*bā`tng).]

defs: To render more violent or bitter; to irritate; to exasperate; to imbitter, as passions or disease.
